confirmed_behavior.expected: Cart Total should equal the sum of item subtotals. In this case, Total should be $25.00.
confirmed_behavior.observed: With one item at quantity 2, the line item displays Subtotal $25.00 but the cart Total displays $12.50.

reproduction_steps: Click 'Add to cart' for Blue Shockproof Phone Case.
Change the Quantity field in the cart to 2.
Observe that line item Subtotal is $25.00 while cart Total remains $12.50.
title: Cart Total shows unit price instead of subtotal when quantity > 1
